metadata.significance: Comforts the Prophet, reminds of Allah's continuous favor and care

translations.en_sahih: And [by] the night when it covers with darkness,
translations.en_yusufali: And by the Night when it is still,-

translations.en_sahih: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].
translations.en_yusufali: Thy Guardian-Lord hath not forsaken thee, nor is He displeased.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bahawa) Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad) tidak meninggalkanmu, dan Ia tidak benci (kepadamu, sebagaimana yang dituduh oleh kaum musyrik).

translations.en_sahih: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].
translations.en_yusufali: And verily the Hereafter will be better for thee than the present.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya kesudahan keaadaanmu adalah lebih baik bagimu daripada permulaannya.

translations.en_sahih: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.
translations.en_yusufali: And soon will thy Guardian-Lord give thee (that wherewith) thou shalt be well-pleased.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Tuhanmu akan memberikanmu (kejayaan dan kebahagiaan di dunia dan di akhirat) sehingga engkau reda - berpuas hati.

translations.en_sahih: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?
translations.en_yusufali: Did He not find thee an orphan and give thee shelter (and care)?
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukankah dia mendapati engkau yatim piatu, lalu la memberikan perlindungan?

translations.en_sahih: And He found you lost and guided [you],
translations.en_yusufali: And He found thee wandering, and He gave thee guidance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan didapatiNya engkau mencari-cari (jalan yang benar), lalu Ia memberikan hidayah petunjuk (dengan wahyu - Al-Quran)?

translations.en_sahih: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.
translations.en_yusufali: And He found thee in need, and made thee independent.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan didapatiNya engkau miskin, lalu Ia memberikan kekayaan?

translations.en_sahih: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore, treat not the orphan with harshness,
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, adapun anak yatim maka janganlah engkau berlaku kasar terhadapnya,

translations.en_sahih: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun orang yang meminta (bantuan pimpinan) maka janganlah engkau tengking herdik;

translations.en_sahih: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].
translations.en_yusufali: But the bounty of the Lord - rehearse and proclaim!
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun nikmat Tuhanmu, maka hendaklah engkau sebut-sebutkan (dan zahirkan) sebagai bersyukur kepadaNya.
